name: Curie Charts
description: On-brand chart specimens for the Curie design system. Pure HTML/CSS/inline-SVG (no chart library); a chart's series colors map --chart-1/--chart-2 to Curie brand tokens. Rendered in the docs at /charts/.

charts.name: Stacked Bar Chart
charts.purpose: A vertical bar chart that stacks two series per category with a legend, footer trend line, and caption — for comparing a two-part total across a time range (e.g. desktop vs mobile visitors per month). Rebuilt on-brand from the shadcn/recharts “stacked + legend” pattern using pure HTML/CSS — no chart library.
charts.whenToUse: When each category's value splits into two meaningful parts and the combined total matters as much as the split. Keep it to 2–3 series; label them in the legend.
charts.whenNotToUse: For a single series (use a plain bar chart), for part-of-whole at one moment (use a donut), or for continuous trends (use a line chart). Not for precise value read-off — pair with a table when exact numbers matter.
charts.interactions: Static presentation specimen — in-app the bars, tooltip, and legend toggle are data-bound (e.g. Recharts). Series colors map --chart-1 / --chart-2 to the Curie brand tokens (purple + teal); bar corners use --radius-xs and the card uses --radius-2xl.
